title: Thoughts on Current Struggles 1/25 — Emily: Stop Observing, Start Loving
html:
TL;DR

  • A one-line micro-fragment captured Jan 25, 2026, but titled with the wrong date ("1/17/2025" in the slug — likely typo for 1/17/2026).
  • The single sentence: "Emily just plead to stop observing her and just start loving her."
  • This is Emily's explicit ask — Yahir is being too analytical, too documentation-mode, and Emily named it. The vault has captured the moment Emily noticed Yahir's pattern of writing-her-into-the-corpus and pushed back on it.
  • Lands ~4 days before the Jan 29 letter to Emily and ~1 week after the Jan 18-22 "i am a fucking killer" / killer fire behind eyes manifesto cluster — Emily's plea arrives in the middle of Yahir's most documentation-intensive personal sprint of the year.
  • A direct meta-callout on the Emily arc documentation practice itself.

Core content

The fragment is 13 words. It is also one of the load-bearing single-sentence notes in the entire 2026 corpus — a third party (Emily) explicitly naming the cost of being observed by someone who keeps a vault. The phrase "plead" (instead of "asked" or "told") signals the exchange was emotionally heavy, not a casual ask.

The note carries no Yahir-side response. We don't know whether Yahir agreed, rejected, or sat with it. Tracking-only.

Pattern observed

This is the same dynamic Yahir has flagged in past relationships: in the Sam doc, the relationship-as-evaluation-process became visible to the partner. With Emily it has surfaced earlier and more explicitly. The pattern is now legible in the vault as a recurring relationship failure mode — the partner notices they are being studied.

This single line foreshadows: (a) the Feb 3 confession letter (Yahir doubles down on documentation rather than dropping it), (b) the Feb 21 spiral, (c) the March 24 misalignment list — Yahir's continued analytic lens on a relationship the partner has explicitly asked him to step out of.

Privacy

  • No PII; Emily already in vault.

Connections
